{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Seven Principles
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Seven Principles]] defined the [[Principle of Fluidity]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c23">''Wintersteel'', chapter 23</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
